variables.name: liverpool_wins_2025_26_premier_league
variables.description: Whether Liverpool finishes 1st in the official 2025-26 Premier League table.

variables.name: liverpool_total_points_2025_26
variables.description: Total number of points accumulated by Liverpool in the 2025-26 Premier League season.

variables.name: manchester_city_points_deduction
variables.description: Whether Manchester City receives a significant points deduction (10+ points) affecting the 2025-26 final table standings.

variables.name: liverpool_transfer_spend_net
variables.description: Liverpool's net transfer spend across the Summer 2025 and Winter 2026 windows in millions of GBP.

variables.name: las_vegas_mlb_team
variables.description: Will Las Vegas officially have an MLB team announced and play a home game there before 2030?

variables.name: oakland_athletics_relocation_finalized
variables.description: Whether the Oakland Athletics finalize all legal, financial, and construction hurdles to move to Las Vegas

variables.name: mlb_expansion_teams_added
variables.description: The number of new expansion teams officially added to MLB by 2030

variables.name: public_funding_availability
variables.description: The amount of public tax dollars or subsidies approved by Nevada/Clark County for an MLB stadium

variables.name: marchand_holds_record_2026
variables.description: Whether Léon Marchand is listed as the 200m individual medley world record holder on Wikipedia on 2026-04-05

variables.name: number_of_major_world_aquatics_events
variables.description: The number of major World Aquatics sanctioned events (World Championships, Olympics) occurring before April 2026 where the record could be broken

variables.name: fastest_200m_im_time_by_others
variables.description: The fastest time recorded in the 200m IM by any swimmer other than Léon Marchand before April 2026

variables.name: is_marchand_active_and_uninjured
variables.description: Whether Léon Marchand remains active in competitive swimming and free from major injury through the end of 2025

variables.name: payc_price_increase_mar_2026
variables.description: Will PAYC's market close price on 2026-03-22 be higher than its market close price on 2026-03-15?

variables.name: payc_weekly_price_change
variables.description: The percentage change in PAYC's market close price from 2026-03-15 to 2026-03-22

variables.name: nasdaq_composite_weekly_trend
variables.description: The percentage change of the NASDAQ Composite Index between March 15 and March 22, 2026, reflecting broader tech sector sentiment

variables.name: payc_trailing_twelve_month_revenue
variables.description: The most recently reported trailing twelve-month (TTM) revenue for Paycom as of March 2026, indicating growth trajectory

variables.name: us_opinion_shift_israel
variables.description: Will the net favorability of Israel in Gallup's 2026 World Affairs survey be higher than the 13% reported in 2025?

variables.name: israel_net_favorability_2026
variables.description: The net favorability (Sympathetic to Israelis minus Sympathetic to Palestinians) in the March 2026 Gallup poll.

variables.name: major_combat_operations_end
variables.description: Will major high-intensity combat operations in Gaza or Lebanon involving the IDF be formally concluded or significantly scaled back by January 2026?

variables.name: us_presidential_approval_israel_policy
variables.description: Average US public approval rating of the President's handling of the situation in the Middle East in early 2026.

variables.name: gas_price_increase_apr2026
variables.description: Whether the average price of regular gas in the US on 2026-04-19 is higher than the price on 2026-04-12

variables.name: wti_crude_oil_price_change
variables.description: The week-over-week change in the spot price of West Texas Intermediate (WTI) crude oil between the second and third weeks of April 2026

variables.name: us_refinery_utilization_rate
variables.description: The percentage of operable atmospheric crude oil distillation capacity in operation in the US during mid-April 2026

variables.name: seasonal_demand_uptick
variables.description: The typical seasonal increase in gasoline demand as the US transitions toward the summer driving season in April

variables.name: fed_loans_increase_may_2026
variables.description: Will the weekly dollar amount of loans made by the Federal Reserve under its liquidity and credit facilities have increased by 2026-05-03 as compared to 2026-04-26?

variables.name: effective_federal_funds_rate
variables.description: The target or effective federal funds rate in May 2026, influencing bank demand for liquidity.

variables.name: financial_stress_index_level
variables.description: The St. Louis Fed Financial Stress Index level in late April 2026; higher stress typically correlates with increased facility usage.

variables.name: active_emergency_lending_programs
variables.description: Whether any emergency lending facilities (similar to BTFP or COVID-era facilities) are active in May 2026.

variables.name: more_violence_against_civilians_faroe
variables.description: Will there be more 'Violence against civilians' in Faroe Islands in the 30 days before 2026-04-19 compared to the 30-day average of the preceding 360 days?

variables.name: historical_annual_violence_events
variables.description: Total number of 'Violence against civilians' events recorded by ACLED in the Faroe Islands over a trailing 365-day period.

variables.name: presence_of_organized_armed_groups
variables.description: Whether any organized armed groups (as defined by ACLED) are actively operating or established within the Faroe Islands.

variables.name: political_instability_index_denmark
variables.description: A measure of political instability or civil unrest within the Kingdom of Denmark (including Faroe Islands) that could trigger organized violence.

variables.name: pro_independence_majority_win
variables.description: Whether pro-independence parties (Plaid Cymru and potentially others) win at least 49 out of 96 seats in the Senedd

variables.name: plaid_cymru_seat_count
variables.description: The total number of seats won by Plaid Cymru in the 2026 Senedd election

variables.name: welsh_independence_polling_average
variables.description: Average percentage support for Welsh independence in polls conducted in the six months prior to the election

variables.name: labour_plaid_coalition_formalized
variables.description: Whether Welsh Labour officially adopts a pro-independence or 'indy-curious' stance in their 2026 manifesto

variables.name: more_fatalities_ghana_30d
variables.description: Whether fatalities in the 30 days before 2026-04-19 exceed the 30-day average of the preceding 360 days.

variables.name: baseline_30day_avg_fatalities
variables.description: The average number of fatalities in Ghana per 30-day period over the 360 days preceding 2026-04-12.

variables.name: target_period_fatalities
variables.description: The total number of ACLED-recorded fatalities in Ghana between 2026-03-20 and 2026-04-18.

variables.name: election_related_violence_spike
variables.description: Whether there is a significant increase in violence against civilians or riots related to political campaigning or local elections during the target period.

variables.name: duda_ranking_maintenance
variables.description: Will Jan-Krzysztof Duda have a FIDE ranking on 2026-06-28 as high or higher than their ranking on 2026-06-21 according to Wikipedia?

variables.name: wiki_fide_update_frequency
variables.description: The number of times the Wikipedia FIDE rankings page is updated with a new official list between June 21 and June 28, 2026

variables.name: duda_elo_rating_change
variables.description: The net change in Duda's official FIDE Elo rating between the June 2026 list and the July 2026 list

variables.name: competitor_performance_variance
variables.description: The average Elo movement of the top 20 players surrounding Duda's rank in the two months preceding June 2026

variables.name: temp_higher_june_14_vs_7
variables.description: Whether the daily average temperature at Nice station is higher on June 14, 2026, than on June 7, 2026.

variables.name: climatological_temp_increase_june
variables.description: The historical average increase in daily mean temperature in Nice between June 7 and June 14.

variables.name: nice_avg_temp_june_7
variables.description: The daily average temperature recorded at the Nice station on 2026-06-07.

variables.name: presence_of_heatwave_mid_june
variables.description: Whether a significant heatwave event is occurring in Southern France during the second week of June 2026.

variables.name: tan_zhongyi_higher_ranking
variables.description: Will Tan Zhongyi's FIDE ranking on 2026-06-28 be as high or higher than on 2026-06-21 according to Wikipedia?

variables.name: wikipedia_fide_ranking_update_frequency
variables.description: The number of times the FIDE rankings page on Wikipedia is updated between June 21 and June 28, 2026

variables.name: fide_official_list_change
variables.description: Whether FIDE publishes a new official monthly rating list between June 21 and June 28, 2026

variables.name: tan_zhongyi_active_games
variables.description: The number of FIDE-rated games Tan Zhongyi plays in the 30 days leading up to June 2026

variables.name: temp_orly_higher_march08_vs_march01
variables.description: Whether the daily average temperature at Orly is higher on 2026-03-08 than on 2026-03-01.

variables.name: historical_avg_temp_diff_march
variables.description: The historical difference in average daily temperature at Orly between March 8 and March 1 (March 8 minus March 1).

variables.name: march_2026_nao_index
variables.description: The value of the North Atlantic Oscillation (NAO) index during early March 2026, which significantly influences European weather patterns.

variables.name: orly_avg_temp_march_01
variables.description: The actual daily average temperature recorded at the Orly station on March 1, 2026.

variables.name: mnx_hires_quant_trader
variables.description: Whether MNX makes an offer before June 2026 and the candidate accepts by July 2026.

variables.name: months_until_deadline
variables.description: Number of full months remaining until the June 2026 hiring deadline from the current date.

variables.name: work_trial_offers_made
variables.description: The number of work trials or initial offers extended to potential quant trader candidates.

variables.name: mnx_liquidity_vault_launch
variables.description: Whether the MNX liquidity vault is operational and requires active management by a dedicated trader.

variables.name: ten_fold_strategic_development_increase
variables.description: Will there be more than ten times as many 'Strategic developments' in Mauritania in the 30 days before 2026-03-08 compared to (1 + 360-day monthly average)?

variables.name: historical_360_day_average_strategic
variables.description: The average number of 'Strategic developments' in Mauritania per 30-day period over the 360 days preceding 2026-03-01

variables.name: target_period_strategic_count
variables.description: The total count of 'Strategic developments' in Mauritania recorded by ACLED between 2026-02-06 and 2026-03-08

variables.name: regional_geopolitical_instability_index
variables.description: Whether a major coup, border conflict, or national election occurs in Mauritania or bordering Mali/Senegal in Q1 2026

variables.name: protest_increase_ukraine_2026
variables.description: Whether the count of protests in Ukraine in the 30 days before 2026-05-17 exceeds the 30-day average of the preceding 360 days.

variables.name: martial_law_active_ukraine
variables.description: Whether martial law (which typically bans mass gatherings and protests) is still active in Ukraine as of May 2026.

variables.name: historical_30_day_avg_protests
variables.description: The average number of ACLED protest events in Ukraine occurring in a typical 30-day window during the 360 days preceding May 2026.

variables.name: active_conflict_intensity_score
variables.description: The average daily count of 'Battles' or 'Explosions' in Ukraine in the 60 days leading up to May 2026, serving as a proxy for social stability.

variables.name: temp_higher_may_17_than_10
variables.description: Whether the daily average temperature at Gourdon is higher on 2026-05-17 than on 2026-05-10.

variables.name: historical_warming_trend_may
variables.description: The average temperature increase observed in Gourdon between May 10 and May 17 based on historical climatology.

variables.name: may_10_daily_avg_temp
variables.description: The daily average temperature at Gourdon station on May 10, 2026.

variables.name: blocking_high_pressure_presence
variables.description: Presence of a persistent high-pressure system (Omega block) over Western Europe during the second week of May 2026.

variables.name: dgs3_increase_june_2026
variables.description: Whether the 3-year US Treasury yield on 2026-06-14 is higher than the value on 2026-06-07.

variables.name: fed_funds_target_rate
variables.description: The upper bound of the Federal Open Market Committee's target range for the federal funds rate as of June 2026.

variables.name: cpi_inflation_yoy_june_2026
variables.description: The year-over-year Consumer Price Index (CPI) inflation rate reported in or around June 2026.

variables.name: treasury_market_volatility_index
variables.description: The level of the ICE BofA MOVE Index, representing market expectations of future interest rate volatility.

variables.description: Whether Wikipedia's 'List of infectious diseases' indicates a vaccine has been developed for Human granulocytic anaplasmosis by June 2026

variables.description: The highest clinical trial phase reached for any HGA vaccine candidate

variables.description: Whether the specific Wikipedia article for Human granulocytic anaplasmosis mentions an active vaccine availability in its infobox or lead section

variables.name: cryptococcosis_vaccine_wikipedia
variables.description: Whether the Wikipedia 'List of infectious diseases' indicates a vaccine is available for Cryptococcosis by June 28, 2026.

variables.name: phase_3_trial_success
variables.description: Whether any Cryptococcosis vaccine candidate successfully completes a Phase 3 clinical trial before 2026.

variables.name: active_clinical_trials_count
variables.description: The number of active clinical trials (Phase 1-3) for a Cryptococcosis vaccine currently listed on ClinicalTrials.gov.

variables.name: fda_approval_status
variables.description: Whether the US FDA has granted approval for a Cryptococcosis vaccine for human use by mid-2026.

variables.name: riots_above_average_period
variables.description: Whether the number of riots in New Caledonia between 2026-02-06 and 2026-03-08 exceeds the 30-day average of the prior 360 days

variables.name: total_riots_360_days
variables.description: The total number of riot events in New Caledonia in the 360 days preceding 2026-03-01

variables.name: riots_target_30_days
variables.description: The number of riot events in New Caledonia during the specific 30-day window of interest

variables.name: political_status_referendum_scheduled
variables.description: Whether a new referendum or major constitutional change regarding New Caledonia's sovereignty is scheduled for the first half of 2026

variables.name: protest_surge_uk_2026
variables.description: Will there be more than ten times as many 'Protests' in UK for the 30 days before 2026-02-22 compared to one plus the 30-day average of the preceding 360 days?

variables.name: baseline_protest_count
variables.description: The 30-day average of 'Protests' in the UK over the 360 days preceding 2026-02-15

variables.name: target_period_protests
variables.description: The total count of 'Protests' in the UK during the 30-day period before 2026-02-22

variables.name: major_uk_civil_unrest_event
variables.description: Occurrence of a major national-scale trigger for civil unrest (e.g., general strike, constitutional crisis, or mass movement) in early 2026

variables.name: new_sanctions_egypt_jordan_uae_oil_gas
variables.description: Whether China, Russia, the U.S., or the EU announce new sanctions on state-owned oil/gas entities in Egypt, Jordan, or the UAE by June 30, 2026.

variables.name: uae_russia_sanctions_circumvention_cases
variables.description: The number of UAE-based entities added to the U.S. OFAC SDN list specifically for aiding Russian sanctions evasion in the energy sector.

variables.name: uae_brics_alignment_index
variables.description: A measure of UAE's geopolitical shift away from Western security frameworks toward BRICS+ (China/Russia) cooperation.

variables.name: major_regional_conflict_escalation
variables.description: Whether a major direct military conflict involving regional powers (e.g., Iran-Israel) leads to Western accusations of energy-funded subversion in Egypt, Jordan, or UAE.

variables.name: brent_crude_oil_price_change

variables.description: Weekly US ending stocks of distillate fuel oil (diesel) in millions of barrels during April 2026

variables.name: refinery_utilization_rate

variables.name: mexico_gdp_growth_forecast
variables.description: The annual GDP growth rate forecast for Mexico for the first quarter of 2026

variables.name: oil_price_wti
variables.description: The price of West Texas Intermediate (WTI) crude oil per barrel in mid-March 2026

variables.name: is_may_03_warmer_than_april_26
variables.description: Whether the daily average temperature at Pamandzi on 2026-05-03 is higher than on 2026-04-26

variables.name: climatological_temp_trend
variables.description: Historical average temperature change between late April and early May in Mayotte

variables.name: pamandzi_avg_temp_may_03
variables.description: The daily average temperature at Pamandzi on 2026-05-03

variables.name: enso_phase_2026
variables.description: The Oceanic Niño Index (ONI) value for early 2026, influencing regional climate patterns

variables.name: wei_increase_2026_05_17
variables.description: Whether the Weekly Economic Index (WEI) value for the week ending 2026-05-17 is higher than the value for the week ending 2026-05-10.

variables.name: wei_absolute_value_may_2026
variables.description: The numerical value of the Weekly Economic Index (WEI) for the week ending 2026-05-17.

variables.name: initial_unemployment_claims_trend
variables.description: The week-over-week change in initial unemployment insurance claims for the reporting week.

variables.name: redbook_sales_yoy_growth
variables.description: The year-over-year percentage change in Redbook same-store sales for the relevant week in May 2026.

variables.name: hood_price_increase
variables.description: Will HOOD's market close price on 2026-06-12 (previous business day to June 14) be higher than its close price on 2026-06-05 (previous business day to June 7)?

variables.name: nasdaq_composite_weekly_return
variables.description: The percentage change in the NASDAQ Composite Index between the close of June 5, 2026 and June 12, 2026.

variables.name: hood_implied_volatility
variables.description: The 30-day implied volatility of Robinhood (HOOD) options as of early June 2026.

variables.name: bitcoin_weekly_price_change
variables.description: The percentage price change of Bitcoin (BTC) between June 5, 2026 and June 12, 2026, which often correlates with HOOD's retail trading activity.

variables.name: battles_guernsey_threshold_met
variables.description: Whether the number of ACLED 'Battles' in Guernsey during the 30 days before 2026-05-31 is more than ten times the baseline calculation.

variables.name: baseline_battle_average
variables.description: The average number of 'Battles' per 30-day period in Guernsey over the 360 days preceding 2026-05-24.

variables.name: actual_battles_period
variables.description: The total number of ACLED 'Battles' recorded in Guernsey during the 30-day target window (2026-05-01 to 2026-05-30).

variables.name: geopolitical_instability_uk_france
variables.description: Occurrence of a major interstate or civil conflict involving the UK or France that spills over into the Channel Islands.

variables.name: primary_credit_increase
variables.description: Whether the weekly dollar amount of loans made under the primary credit lending program increases between 2026-02-01 and 2026-02-08.

variables.name: fed_funds_rate_target
variables.description: The upper limit of the Federal Open Market Committee's target range for the federal funds rate as of February 2026.

variables.name: bank_reserve_scarcity_index
variables.description: An indicator or proxy for liquidity stress in the banking system, where higher values indicate more banks seeking discount window access.

variables.name: liquidity_stress_event
variables.description: Whether a significant financial market liquidity event or banking sector instability occurs in the first week of February 2026.

variables.name: pahlavi_enters_iran
variables.description: Whether Reza Pahlavi physically enters the terrestrial territory of Iran by May 31, 2026.

variables.name: iranian_regime_collapse
variables.description: Whether the current government of the Islamic Republic of Iran collapses or undergoes a transition of power that permits Pahlavi's return.

variables.name: significant_political_unrest_index
variables.description: An index representing the scale of domestic protests and civil unrest in Iran (1 = status quo, 10 = total revolution).

variables.name: pahlavi_public_approval
variables.description: The estimated percentage of the Iranian population that would support Pahlavi's return to a leadership or advisory role.

variables.name: violence_against_civilians_ratio_exceeds_ten
variables.description: Whether 'Violence against civilians' in Russia in the 30 days before 2026-02-22 is more than ten times 1 plus the 30-day average of the preceding 360 days.

variables.name: baseline_30_day_avg_violence
variables.description: The average number of 'Violence against civilians' events in Russia per 30-day period over the 360 days preceding 2026-02-15.

variables.name: target_period_violence_count
variables.description: The total number of 'Violence against civilians' events recorded by ACLED in Russia during the 30 days before 2026-02-22.

variables.name: major_internal_instability_event
variables.description: Occurrence of a major coup attempt, mass uprising, or significant escalation of internal conflict within Russia before February 2026.

variables.name: yemen_violence_civilians_increase
variables.description: Whether the count of 'Violence against civilians' in Yemen for the 30 days before 2026-04-19 is higher than the 30-day average of the 360 days preceding 2026-04-12.

variables.name: baseline_30day_average_violence
variables.description: The calculated average number of 'Violence against civilians' events per 30-day period over the 360 days preceding 2026-04-12.

variables.name: houthi_saudi_peace_status
variables.description: Whether a formal, nationwide ceasefire or peace agreement between the Houthis and the internationally recognized government/Saudi coalition is active during the target period.

variables.name: red_sea_escalation_intensity
variables.description: A score representing the intensity of regional maritime or airstrike escalations involving Yemen that could spill over into domestic civilian targeting.

variables.name: etr_price_increase_feb_2026
variables.description: Will Entergy's market close price on 2026-02-22 be higher than its market close price on 2026-02-15?

variables.name: etr_weekly_return_percentage
variables.description: The percentage change in ETR's stock price between the close on 2026-02-13 (the Friday before 02-15) and 2026-02-20 (the Friday before 02-22).

variables.name: sp500_utilities_index_change
variables.description: The weekly percentage change of the S&P 500 Utilities sector index during the week of February 16, 2026.

variables.name: etr_beta_to_market
variables.description: The 1-year historical beta of Entergy Corporation relative to the S&P 500 as of early 2026, indicating its relative volatility.
